title: WORKSHOP ON COLLEGE CLOUD ED - JUIT
content: Workshop on College Cloud Ed. for VLabs by IIITH: 9-12 May, 2017 Workshop on College Cloud Edition for Virtual Labs during 9 th -12th May, 2017 at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat- 173234 by the team of Indian Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad. Following salient points are observed for during the workshop. a. First day, the team of experts setup a cloud edition in Computer Lab 9 on 25 computers. This makes it possible to use the virtual labs off line. b. Second day the workshop was conducted by the team for an audience of almost 45 faculty and staff members. The team explains the importance of cloud edition for virtual labs and then explains how the faculty can contribute to vlab’s project. c. Third day the workshop was opened by our Hon’able Vice Chancellor, Professor Vinod Kumar, Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat by his valuable words. Later Professor Choppella conducted the workshop for students. The total presence of the student was around 60. d. Same day on evening Professsor choppella and his team had an explanatory session from 5PM to 7:30PM with students to development of Asynchronous distributed software at GITHUB. The session was appreciated by the audience very much. The strength of the session was 23. e. Forth day, Professor Coppella and his team had an interaction and explanatory session with faculty, staff and students. f. Fifth day the team and coordinators collected the feedback and distribute the certificates to the participant with providing thanks to each other and motivate the audience to contribute in vlabs development.
